execute().notice: Execute the staking - send to external contract if threshold met

withdraw().notice: Allows users to withdraw if threshold was NOT met

userdoc.notice: A staking contract where users stake ETH before a deadline

documentation.text: @notice Ensures staking hasn't been completed yet

@notice Sets up the staker contract
 @param exampleExternalContractAddress Address of ExampleExternalContract

@notice Allows users to stake ETH
 @dev Must be before deadline and not completed

@notice Execute the staking - send to external contract if threshold met
 @dev Can only be called after deadline
@notice Allows users to withdraw if threshold was NOT met

@notice Returns time left until deadline
 @return Time remaining in seconds (0 if deadline passed)

@notice Get contract's total ETH balance
 @return Balance in wei

@notice Allows contract to receive ETH directly
 @dev Automatically calls stake() when ETH is sent
